hooks.command: echo 'INSTRUCTION: Before reading files or grepping, first use code-review-graph MCP tools to search the knowledge graph: start with get_minimal_context, then semantic_search_nodes for symbols, query_graph for relationships (callers_of/callees_of/imports_of/children_of). Only fall back to direct Read/Grep if MCP results are insufficient.'
git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && /Users/asthajyoti/code/pragmata/.venv/bin/code-review-graph status --repo "/Users/asthajyoti/code/pragmata" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph status --repo "/Users/asthajyoti/code/pragmata" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
